nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: I’m surprised you got it all back, wonderful!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Will this fix the Nocturne heart?

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: It’s not that simple dear…

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: What do you mean?

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Just go ahead and put the crystals and you’ll find out by yourself

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Put the crystals into the shrine.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: The crystals shine and form a portal. Kael glows as the portal opens.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: We did it!

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: I feel a lot better now!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: It really did fix something inside of you Kael!

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Hm… Looking at the portal it seems we're not done yet.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Let’s just ask Ferry!

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You look at the table; it is not floating anymore and there is no sign of Ferry.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Where did he go?

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: We never know…

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Let’s just go into the portal and see what it does

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Are we just going to leave Ferry?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: He will be fine!

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Yeah, I got a feeling he knows more than we do… I’m sure he was telling us to go further into the portal!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Let’s go then!
